[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game-style “LEVEL UP!” interface screen is displayed with a profile circle, level and experience progress, and several labeled counters.

The main subject is a rectangular user interface panel on a dark background showing a “LEVEL UP!” header and a centered dashboard for “VYINZ | BOT,” including a level badge, an experience bar, and three small statistic boxes.

Setting: The image appears to be a digital UI graphic with no real-world setting visible. Lighting and time of day are not applicable because it is a screen capture or design mockup on a dark, gradient backdrop.

Visual Details: The top center contains the text “LEVEL UP!” in gold, with small decorative gold diamond shapes on both sides. The main panel is a rounded rectangle with a dark, bluish-gray background and a thin border. Near the top left/center inside the panel, large white text reads “VYINZ | BOT,” with a small gold circular badge to the right that contains “#2.” Beneath that, smaller text “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in a lighter purple/gray. On the left side, there is a circular profile image with a purple ring border; the contents inside the circle show a busy collage of illustrated elements, including anime-like faces and multicolored shapes, though the exact details are unclear due to size. In the center, two rounded boxes display “LEVEL 7” in a purple box and “EXPERIENCE 2 / 400” in a teal-green box. Below, there is a long horizontal dark bar with a small white percentage value reading “0%” to the right, suggesting progress. At the bottom area, three small dark boxes with purple text labels show “MESSAGES 329,” “XP NEEDED 398,” and “NEXT LVL 8.” A faint line of text near the bottom center reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” but it is very subtle. The composition is horizontally balanced, with the profile circle left and the progress/metrics in the center and right, viewed straight-on.

Visible Text: LEVEL UP!
VYINZ | BOT
#2
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
7
EXPERIENCE
2 / 400
0%
MESSAGES
329
XP NEEDED
398
NEXT LVL
8
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary: The image shows a level-up dashboard UI with a profile circle and progress indicators for level and experience. It includes counters for messages, remaining XP needed, and the next level number.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
